title: Not Enough Guns
description: A modpack that compiles some of the best gun/war mods ever. Theres something for everyone!
body: This modpack compiles some of the most well-known and best gun/warfare mods. As well as guns, it also includes tanks, aircraft and other military weapons and vehicles. It also includes some custom weapons and utilities. This modpack is also compatible with shaders, although might be a little laggy.
